---
name: Skill request
about: Request or discuss an agent skill for SDD Master
title: "skill: "
labels: skill
assignees: ""
---

## Skill goal

What should the skill help an agent do?

## Target agents

Which agents or IDEs should use it?

## Inputs and outputs

Describe expected inputs, files read, files written, and outputs.

## Safety boundaries

List files, commands, or data that must be blocked.

## Validation

How should the skill be tested or reviewed?

## Safety notes

Do not include `.env`, tokens, credentials, private keys, personal data, or internal `.sdd-master/` content from consumer projects.
